servinfo.title: Tightening Torque Specifications

attention3.ptxt: The tightening torque(s) also specified in:

ptxt.intxref: Hood Lock Member, Lamp Support Member and Lamp Support Brace Removal and Installation
Cowl Side Outer Member Removal and Installation
A-Pillar Outer Panel, Front Door Hinge Reinforcement and Dash Side Panel Removal and Installation
A-Pillar Outer Panel, Front Door Hinge Reinforcement, Dash Side Panel, Front Pillar Inner Panel and Front Pillar Upper Reinforcement Removal and Installation

servinfo.ptxt: For the tightening torques of fasteners not specified in this section, refer to Fasteners Information .
